name: ASRock Z790 STEEL LEGEND WiFi ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6800+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - eDP 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E

description: ATX Z790 motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket with WiFi 6E, offering premium features for enthusiasts.
